ddls:
CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "agency" REAL /* Agency or organization the person is associated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the person */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for data integrity and security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person the traits belong to */,
  "agreeableness" REAL /* Agreeableness score */,
  "attractiveness" REAL /* Attractiveness score */,
  "competence" REAL /* Competence score */,
  "conscientiousness" REAL /* Conscientiousness score */,
  "dominance" REAL /* Dominance score */,
  "experience" REAL /* Experience score */,
  "extraversion" REAL /* Extraversion score */,
  "intelligence" REAL /* Intelligence score */,
  "neuroticism" REAL /* Neuroticism score */,
  "openness" REAL /* Openness score */,
  "trustworthiness" REAL /* Trustworthiness score */,
  "warmth" REAL /* Warmth score */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source of the personality trait data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the personality trait data was collected or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personality_traits_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "person_org_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person associated with the organization */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the association */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the association */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person within the organization */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the person within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_person_org_association_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_person_org_association_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark record */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality trait */,
  "low_threshold" REAL /* Low threshold for the trait */,
  "high_threshold" REAL /* High threshold for the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry for the benchmark */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Organization type for the benchmark */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source or methodology used to establish the benchmark values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Manager, Data Analyst, Executive) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action or feature accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
